info.title: Keasy API
info.description: Keasy — data pipeline execution, cloud storage, and Gaia-X compliance API

200.description: SSE stream: delta events + complete with GenerateResponse
SSE stream: delta events + complete with SuggestResponse

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's profile, org, and effective role.
Protected by session_required but NOT tenant_context_required.

Returns the list of dataspaces the authenticated user has access to,
resolved from the `dataspaces` session value to display info via
the dataspaces table. Used by the sidebar instance switcher.

400.description: Invalid connection or container not found

200.description: List of files in the connection

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Relative file path within the connection

400.description: Schema inference failed or unsupported file type

200.description: AI answer with DuckDB SQL query
Signed URLs for direct Parquet access

404.description: Job not found or no output

200.description: SSE stream of job progress events
List of users in the org

explain.description:
When true, the LLM acts as a data analyst explaining query results
instead of generating SQL. The question should contain the original
question, SQL, and result rows.

schema.description:
DuckDB table schema from the frontend (column names, types, sample values).
When provided, this is used as context for SQL generation instead of the
pipeline summary.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query generated by the LLM (executed client-side via DuckDB-WASM).

AskResultCode.description: Result code for AI ask responses — replaces raw string literals.

ColumnStat.description: Per-column statistics for a vertex property.

name.description: Short label used as Parquet column name.

ComplyEvent.description: SSE event emitted during the comply pipeline.

index.description: Index 0-5, maps to frontend PHASES array

phase.description: Phase name: key_generation, certificate, lrn_request, signing, compliance_submission, complete

ComplyRequest.description: Request body for the one-click comply endpoint.

cert_chain_pem.description: Optional PEM cert chain — fallback if Caddy certs are unavailable.

ComplyResponse.description: Response from the one-click comply endpoint.

failed_phase.description: Which phase failed: key_generation, certificate, lrn_request, lp_signing, tc_signing, compliance_submission.

DataManifest.description: GraphAr-compatible manifest describing a property graph stored as Parquet files.

DataResponse_Value.description: Typed envelope for successful API responses: `{ "data": T }`.

EdgeManifest.description: Manifest for an edge type (GraphAr v1 ordered adjacency lists).

by_source.description: CSR-ordered edge parquet (ordered by source vertex).

by_target.description: CSC-ordered edge parquet (ordered by target vertex).

EdgeStatus.description: One edge type — its CSR/CSC Parquet pair and endpoints.

count.description: Edge count (Parquet footer metadata); `None` if the count query failed.

edge_type.description: The edge type / predicate local name.

catalog_base.description: Base URL for catalog parquets in promotor storage.

oneOf.description:
DCAT-AP catalog manifest (RDF-rich; drives the Turtle export). keasy
governance output, parquets stored in promotor cloud.

GraphAr structure from the fossil subprocess: per-type Parquet + row
count + columns, per-edge CSR/CSC pair. Column statistics are NOT here —
the browser computes them from the Parquet (DuckDB-WASM).

rdf_base.description: Base URL for RDF Parquet storage (set when job uses Rdf output).

JobEvent.description: SSE event emitted by the job runner at each execution phase.

JobRuntimeError.description:
Runtime job error — stored in the database as JSON on a failed job.
This is NOT an API error type; it is a serializable record of what went wrong during execution.

id.description: None = JSON-RPC notification; Some = request expecting a response.

method.description:
Server-pushed notification piggy-backed in a response body.
Present only when the request was a notification that produced
a server-side push (e.g., `didChange` → `publishDiagnostics`).

OrgMember.description:
An org member — a Keycloak user's membership in a Keasy organization.
Profile fields (email, first_name, last_name) are cached from OIDC tokens.

catalog_base_url.description: Base URL for catalog parquet storage (e.g. s3://promotor/catalogs/).

catalog_cloud_account_id.description: Cloud account ID for catalog parquet storage (set by promotor).

RunStatus.description: The status object `fossil run --output-json` writes to stdout.

dest.description: Destination URL the `GraphAr` dataset was written under (echoes `--dest`).

edges.description: One entry per emitted edge type (empty until a shape/Phase-B adds edges).

vertices.description: One entry per emitted vertex type.

TypeManifest.description: Manifest for a vertex type (one Parquet file per type).

vertex_file.description: Relative path to vertex Parquet file.

VertexStatus.description:
One vertex type — its dataset-relative Parquet, row count, and property
columns.

count.description: Row count (Parquet footer metadata); `None` if the count query failed.
